description: See Request Host Access ProtoFlux Node.

fields.Host: The host destination string being accessed.
fields.Port: The port being asked for access.
fields.AccessType: The access type wanted for the port.
fields._hostText: The text field used to show the server wanting access for.
fields._reasonText: The reason for accessing the server.
fields._allowButton: The button to allow the server to be accessed through your client.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
